description: Configure the Wazuh Syscollector module in the manager configuration (ossec.conf) with a scan interval of 3 minutes. Install the socat utility on the manager system and ensure the configuration is applied. Using the Wazuh API (https://localhost:55000, User: wazuh-wui, Pass: MyS3cr37P450r.*-), query the package inventory for agent 000 to find the socat entry. Save the raw JSON response for the socat package to /home/ga/socat_inventory.json.
